canonical_definition: Graph-based Twitter dataset containing one million users, nearly one hundred million tweets, and relational data, used for training and evaluating social bot detection and human-like generation.
papers: How do Language Models Reshape Entity Alignment? A Survey ofLM-DrivenEAMethods: Advances, Benchmarks, and Future
